ResearchProjectDef.label: RobCo OS
ResearchProjectDef.description: Reverse-engineer the recovered RobCo operating system and adapt it for use in a modern mechanitor network. This is required to deploy RobCo's Securitron line and the heaviest RobCo war machines.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Liberty Prime path
ResearchProjectDef.description: Unlocks the Liberty Prime recovery path and its associated securitron fabrication route.

ResearchProjectDef.label: War Machine path
ResearchProjectDef.description: Unlocks the War Machine recovery path and its associated liberator fabrication route.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Pacificator path
ResearchProjectDef.description: Unlocks the Pacificator recovery path and its associated Scurrybot fabrication line.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Synth path
ResearchProjectDef.description: Unlocks synthetic-personnel technology, including fabrication of unarmed generation 1 synths that can use ordinary weapons and apparel.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Think Tank path
ResearchProjectDef.description: Unlocks the Big MT recovery path, including Roboscorpions, surgical Think Tank conversion, and Big MT lobotomy.
